navigation.archive_path: single JS-rendered page with accordion listing all volumes; each accordion item expands to reveal individual article PDF links under 'Articles', 'Comments', 'Review Essays', 'Case Notes', 'Book Reviews' sections
navigation.notes: REQUIRES Playwright headless for discovery — page is fully JS-rendered (accordion built client-side). Legacy TLS (unsafe renegotiation) + self-signed cert chain; requests library needs ssl.OP_LEGACY_SERVER_CONNECT + verify=False. PDF URLs: /ua/media/{id}/alr_{vol}-{issue}_{seq}_{authors}.pdf. Full-issue PDFs also present: alr_{vol}-{issue}.pdf (skip these). Title = link text. Author not captured by adapter selector. Volume and year visible in accordion heading text but not as CSS field on article links. Site note: 'currently undergoing restructuring' per 2026-03 banner.
